title: Most powerful gun
description: A gun that can do 1000000 damage
body:
WARNING this mod NEEDS neoforge

This is a strong gun that can deal 1,000,000 damage.

It fun you can shot you friends and they die right on the spot.

You got to still find the power ore if you in survival then craft the gun and bullets

it's that simple

recipes in images

This mod is a fork from most powerful things
